trending_videos.title: NCAAM Final Four: Michigan vs. Arizona
trending_videos.description: The Wolverines play the Wildcats in the Final Four of the NCAA Men's Basketball Championship. Arizona returns to the Final Four for the first time since 2001; Michigan makes its first appearance since 2018. Yaxel Lendeborg faces Brayden Burries.

trending_videos.title: Fox & Friends Weekend
trending_videos.description: FOX & Friends Weekend, hosted by Rachel Campos-Duffy and Charlie Hurt, highlights the latest in news, entertainment, politics, and sports.

trending_videos.title: All Elite Wrestling: Collision
trending_videos.description: The Death Riders & Dogs combine forces to face Kevin Knight, Mistico and the Conglomeration. AEW TBS Champion Willow Nightingale issues an open challenge. Jon Moxley faces Anthony Bowens in an AEW Continental Title Eliminator match.

trending_videos.title: College GameDay
trending_videos.description: ESPN's top College Basketball analysts cover all the angles in men's college basketball with game previews, exclusive interviews, analysis, behind-the-scenes features and daring predictions.

trending_videos.title: Valero Texas Open, Third Round
trending_videos.description: From TPC San Antonio in San Antonio.

trending_videos.title: R. Kelly - It Seems Like You’re Ready
trending_videos.description:
R. Kelly - It Seems Like You’re Ready
 Stream/Download:

(Lyrics):
[Intro]
Uh, what's up, baby?
Come here, I wanna taste you
But I know you're gonna like it
So, are you ready?
I love the way your body feels next to mine
Listen, let me explain

[Verse 1]
Temperature's rising
And your body's yearning for me, oh, baby
Girl, lay it on me, I place no one above thee
Oh, take me to your ecstasy

[Chorus]
It seems like you're ready
Seems like you're ready (seems like you're ready)
Girl, are you ready to go all the way? All the way
It seems like you're ready (seems like you're ready)
Seems like you're ready
Girl, are you ready to go all the way? All the way

[Verse 2]
I can smell your perfume
Step into my bedroom, let me love you constantly (come here, baby)
Oh, oh, your body is my playground, let me lick you up and down
Make you feel like a woman should

[Chorus]

Seems like you're ready (seems like you're ready)
Girl, are you ready to go all the way? Girl, all the wa
